steps.title: Identify the rightmost interval
steps.content: The histogram's rightmost bar covers [200, 250) with frequency 5. These 5 data points all fall within this interval, so each is at least 200 feet. Therefore, the maximum value in the dataset must be at least 200.

steps.title: Evaluate which choice is valid
steps.content: The maximum must be $\geq 200$. Among the choices, only 218 is at least 200. That matches choice D — D is correct.
